articles.title: Coinbase’s Bitcoin-Collateralized Loans Now Available in 20 States in the U.S
articles.description: Coinbase announced today that it has increased the number of U.S. states in which residents are eligible for Bitcoin-collateralized loans from the exchange. The company has also increased the percentage limit that customers can borrow on their Bitcoin holdings, from 30% to 40%.
